items.title: Bhuvneshwar leads IPL 2026 Purple Cap table after fifth three-for of the season
items.summary: There was no change in the top three of the Orange Cap table, but Virat Kohli consolidated his place at No. 4 and Shubman Gill moved past KL Rahul to No. 5
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: F1 returns at Miami after a 5-week break as FIA rolls out rule changes
items.summary: Drivers heavily criticized because of how the electrical battery power has changed the cars and competition
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Hypnosis, Al Pacino and lies - how I tried to motivate my players
items.summary: Tony Pulis explains some of the unorthodox ways he tried to motivate players during his 30 years as a manager, including how some of them did not work.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
